name: Beamer
description: Beamer — in-app changelog, announcements, and NPS widget to notify users about updates and gather feedback.

seo.title: Beamer — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Beamer: Beamer — in-app changelog, announcements, and NPS widget to notify users about updates and gather feedback.

when_to_use: In-app changelog widget to announce new features to active users
NPS collection embedded in SaaS dashboard or mobile app
Product update notifications to reduce support tickets on new releases
Segmented announcements to power users vs new users

pros: NPS collection bundled without extra tooling
Fast install — minutes to first notification
Reasonable pricing for SMB product teams
cons: Not a real push or messaging platform
Targeting rules are basic versus dedicated tools
Widget customization is limited on free tier
Analytics are shallow for growth teams
review.verdict: A focused changelog and announcements widget — great at that one job, wrong tool for CRM workflows.
review.best_for: SaaS teams announcing product updates inside the app quickly
review.not_for: Complex multichannel engagement or behavior-triggered campaigns
